title: OpenTrust Trust Ladder
description: The 8 levels of trust status for Agent Tool Passports. Levels are ordered — a tool can only advance forward except for disputed, which can apply at any stage.

default.description: Passport was auto-generated from source metadata. No human has reviewed or claimed it.
default.requirements: None — any tool gets this on import.

default.description: The creator has claimed ownership via GitHub OAuth or domain verification.
default.requirements: Verified ownership of the source repository or domain.

default.description: The owner has actively reviewed and confirmed the passport metadata is accurate.
default.requirements: Creator claimed + manual confirmation of permissions and capabilities.

default.description: The community has reviewed and provided feedback on the passport.
default.requirements: owner_confirmed + at least 3 community reviews with no unresolved concerns.

default.description: A qualified technical reviewer has signed an attestation for this passport version.
default.requirements: community_reviewed + signed attestation from a registered reviewer.

default.description: The tool has passed defined automated security checks for this version.
default.requirements: reviewer_signed + passing dependency scan, manifest validation, and permission audit.

default.description: The tool is under active version and dependency monitoring. Status updates automatically when evidence changes.
One or more claims in this passport are under active challenge. Do not rely on this tool until dispute is resolved.
default.requirements: Can apply at any level. Clears when dispute is resolved.
